_comment: Wave 6C — governance file for the news agent's grounded-source filter. Edit + commit; news_agent reloads on startup. Keep curation conservative — better to drop a low-quality source than cite it. `vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com` is the Gemini grounding redirect domain (the underlying source URL is masked behind a privacy-preserving Google redirect); allowing it means we trust Gemini's `google_search` curation + the per-item relevance filter to keep off-topic items out.
